Sub 'Gravar'
do 'GravarPrecos' if &SdtColunasTabela1.TabIsAntAcr = true &UmPerc1.SetFocus() Else &UMTabPrc1.SetFocus() Endif
EndSub
Sub 'VerificaPrimeiroItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod if &PedItmCod = PedItmCod btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 0 Endif Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'VerificaUltimoItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, (PedItmCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod if &PedItmCod = PedItmCod btnProximoItem.Enabled = 0 Endif Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GravarPrecos'
if not &UMTabCod.IsEmpty() if (&sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc1 <> &UMTabPrc1 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc2 <> &UMTabPrc2 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc3 <> &UMTAbPrc3 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc4 <> &UMTAbPrc4 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc5 <> &UMTAbPrc5 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc6 <> &UMTAbPrc6 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc7 <> &UMTAbPrc7 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc8 <> &UMTAbPrc8 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrc9 <> &UMTAbPrc9) GravaProdutoNaTabelaNovo.Call(&EmpCod, &UMTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela1.TabUltAlt, &ProCod, 1, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &UMTAbPrc1, &UMTAbPrc2, &UMTAbPrc3, &UMTAbPrc4, &UMTAbPrc5,&UMTAbPrc6,&UMTAbPrc7,&UMTAbPrc8,&UMTAbPrc9, &Context.UserName, &UmPerc1, &UmPerc2,&UmPerc3,&UmPerc4,&UmPerc5,&UmPerc6,&UmPerc7,&UmPerc8,&UmPerc9) EndIf GravaProdutoNaTabelaAdicional.Call(&EmpCod, &UMTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela1.TabUltAlt, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &sdtLoadPrecoProduto1.TabPrcIsTip, &TabPerAcr1, &TabPerAnt1, &TabDtaVct1, &Context.UserName) Endif
if not &DOISTabCod.IsEmpty() if (&sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc1 <> &DOISTabPrc1 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc2 <> &DOISTabPrc2 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc3 <> &DOISTAbPrc3 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc4 <> &DOISTAbPrc4 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc5 <> &DOISTAbPrc5 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc6 <> &DOISTAbPrc6 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc7 <> &DOISTAbPrc7 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc8 <> &DOISTAbPrc8 or &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrc9 <> &DOISTAbPrc9) GravaProdutoNaTabelaNovo.Call(&EmpCod, &DOISTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela2.TabUltAlt, &ProCod, 1, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &DOISTAbPrc1, &DOISTAbPrc2, &DOISTAbPrc3, &DOISTAbPrc4, &DOISTAbPrc5,&DOISTAbPrc6,&DOISTAbPrc7,&DOISTAbPrc8,&DOISTAbPrc9, &Context.UserName, &DOISPerc1, &DOISPerc2,&DOISPerc3,&DOISPerc4,&DOISPerc5,&DOISPerc6,&DOISPerc7,&DOISPerc8,&DOISPerc9) EndIf GravaProdutoNaTabelaAdicional.Call(&EmpCod, &DOISTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela2.TabUltAlt, &ProCod, 1, &sdtLoadPrecoProduto2.TabPrcIsTip, &TabPerAcr2, &TabPerAnt2, &TabDtaVct2, &Context.UserName) Endif
if &AtualizarMarKup = true //AtualizaVenda if &TCon083_Markup = 'S' //GravaIMC.Call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, 0, 0, 0, 0, &novaMargemColuna1, true) //JDF NAO ACONCELHAVEL GRAVAR ISSO Else GravaAcrescimoVenda.call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &novaMargemColuna1)
EndIf Endif
If &SalvarAvancar = true &OldPedItmCod = &PedItmCod if &PedCod > 0 do 'ProximoItem' do 'VerificaUltimoItem' Endif
if &OldPedItmCod = &PedItmCod Return EndIf Else msg('Preços Atualizados com sucesso!') EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'AnteriorItem'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod //PEDIDO Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, (PedItmCod) //ITENS Where PedItmCod < &PedItmCod
&ProCodNom = ProRefNom &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &PedItmCod = PedItmCod &MarCodNom = MarCodNom
if PedVlrCus > 0 do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrCus > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrCus / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus EndCase Else do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrUntDsc > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrUntDsc / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc EndCase EndIF &OldCusto = ProVlrCus
&ProImc = ProIMC IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProVlrVda = round((&PedVlrUntComDsc * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), &QtdCasasDecimais) EndIF
Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor
If &OldCusto < &PedVlrUntComDsc &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Else &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Endif &TabPrc1 = RetornaValorTab.UDP(&EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) Do Case CAse &ProVlrVda > &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case &ProVlrVda < &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Otherwise &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase
do 'CarregaTabelasPrecos'
EndSub
Sub 'ProximoItem'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod //PEDIDO Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod //ITENS Where PedItmCod > &PedItmCod
&ProCodNom = ProRefNom &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &PedItmCod = PedItmCod &MarCodNom = MarCodNom
if PedVlrCus > 0 do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrCus > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrCus / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus EndCase Else do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrUntDsc > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrUntDsc / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc EndCase EndIF &OldCusto = ProVlrCus
&ProImc = ProIMC IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProVlrVda = round((&PedVlrUntComDsc * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), &QtdCasasDecimais) EndIF
Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor
If &OldCusto < &PedVlrUntComDsc &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Else &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Endif &TabPrc1 = RetornaValorTab.UDP(&EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) Do Case CAse &ProVlrVda > &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case &ProVlrVda < &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Otherwise &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase do 'CarregaTabelasPrecos'
EndSub
Sub 'CarregaTabelasPrecos'
if not &UMTabCod.IsEmpty() &TabCod = &UMTabCod Do 'LoadPreco' Endif
if not &DoiSTabCod.IsEmpty() &TabCod = &DOISTabCod Do 'LoadPrecoTab2' Endif
EndSub
Sub 'loadPedido'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod //PEDIDO Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
tbOldCusto.Visible = (PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO)
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod //ITENS Where PedItmCod = &PedItmCod
&ProCodNom = ProRefNom &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &MarCodNom = MarCodNom
if PedVlrCus > 0 do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrCus > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrCus / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrCus EndCase Else do case CAse PedProEmbQtd > 0 and PedVlrUntDsc > 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = round(PedVlrUntDsc / PedProEmbQtd, 5) CAse PedProEmbQtd < 0 &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc * PedProEmbQtd Otherwise &PedVlrUntComDsc = PedVlrUntDsc EndCase EndIF &OldCusto = ProVlrCus
&ProImc = ProIMC IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProVlrVda = round((&PedVlrUntComDsc * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), &QtdCasasDecimais) EndIF Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor
If &OldCusto < &PedVlrUntComDsc &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Else &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Endif
&TabPrc1 = RetornaValorTab.UDP(&EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) Do Case CAse &ProVlrVda > &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case &ProVlrVda < &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Otherwise &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'loadPedidoZero'
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &parProCod
tbOldCusto.Visible = (ProVlrCus <> &parPedVlrCusNov)
&ProCodNom = ProRefNom &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &MarCodNom = MarCodNom &OldCusto = ProVlrCus
&ProImc = ProIMC IF &PedVlrUntComDsc > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProVlrVda = round((&PedVlrUntComDsc * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), &QtdCasasDecimais) EndIF
Exit EndFor
If &OldCusto < &PedVlrUntComDsc &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Else &PedVlrUntComDsc.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Endif
&TabPrc1 = RetornaValorTab.UDP(&EmpCod, &FilTabCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod) Do Case CAse &ProVlrVda > &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(200,0,0) Case &ProVlrVda < &TabPrc1 &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,60,200) Otherwise &ProVlrVda.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndCase
EndSub

if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol3 <> 0 &DOISTabPrc3 = round(&DOISTabPrc2 + (&DOISTabPrc2 * &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol3/100),&TCon108_CasasDecimais) Else &DOISTabPrc3 = &DOISTabPrc2 EndIF
if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol4 <> 0 &DOISTabPrc4 = round(&DOISTabPrc3 + (&DOISTabPrc3 * &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol4/100),&TCon108_CasasDecimais) Else &DOISTabPrc4 = &DOISTabPrc3 EndIF
if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol5 <> 0 &DOISTabPrc5 = round(&DOISTabPrc4 + (&DOISTabPrc4 * &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol5/100),&TCon108_CasasDecimais) Else &DOISTabPrc5 = &DOISTabPrc4 EndIF
if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol6 <> 0 &DOISTabPrc6 = round(&DOISTabPrc5 + (&DOISTabPrc5 * &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol6/100),&TCon108_CasasDecimais) Else &DOISTabPrc6 = &DOISTabPrc5 EndIF

if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol9 <> 0 &DOISTabPrc9 = round(&DOISTabPrc8 + (&DOISTabPrc8 * &SdtColunasTabela2.TabPerCol9/100),&TCon108_CasasDecimais) Else &DOISTabPrc9 = &DOISTabPrc8 EndIF EndIF

Percent.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc1.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc2.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc3.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc4.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc5.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc6.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc7.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc8.Visible = &ZeroUm &UmPerc9.Visible = &ZeroUm

Sub 'carregaDados'
if not &UMTabCod.IsEmpty() RetornaColunas_Nome.Call(&EmpCod, &UMTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela1) &UMTabNom = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabNom
padraousuario.Call('L', '#PRODUTOPRECOOPC', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if &PadObs.IsEmpty() retornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon108_CasasDecimais, &PadObs) if &PadObs.IsEmpty() &TCon108_CasasDecimais = 2 Else &TCon108_CasasDecimais = val(&PadObs) Endif
&PadObs = trim(Str(&TCon108_CasasDecimais)) + 'N' if &SdtColunasTabela1.TabRecCol = true &PadObs += 'S' Else &PadObs += 'N' Endif Endif &TCon108_CasasDecimais = Val(Substr(&PadObs,1,1)) &txtPercentuais = Substr(&PadObs,2,1) &txtRecalcu = Substr(&PadObs,3,1) do 'padraoColunas'
&TabCod = &UMTabCod Do 'LoadPreco'
tbDadosAntecipacao1.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabIsAntAcr &TabIsAntAcr1 = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabIsAntAcr
Tab1.Visible = 1 Tab1a.Visible = 1
txtprc1.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom1 txtprc2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom2 txtprc3.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom3 txtprc4.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom4 txtprc5.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom5 txtprc6.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom6 txtprc7.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom7 txtprc8.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom8 txtprc9.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela1.TabColNom9
prc1.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem1 prc2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem2 prc3.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem3 prc4.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem4 prc5.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem5 prc6.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem6 prc7.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem7 prc8.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem8 prc9.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem9
Acr2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem2 Acr3.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem3 Acr4.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem4 Acr5.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem5 Acr6.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem6 Acr7.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem7 Acr8.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem8 Acr9.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela1.Tem9 Endif
if not &DOISTabCod.IsEmpty() TabelaPreco2.Visible = 1 RetornaColunas_Nome.Call(&EmpCod, &DOISTabCod, &SdtColunasTabela2) &DOISTabNom = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabNom
padraousuario.Call('L', '#PRODUTOPRECO2OPC', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if &PadObs.IsEmpty() retornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon108_CasasDecimais, &PadObs) if &PadObs.IsEmpty() &TCon108_CasasDecimais = 2 Else &TCon108_CasasDecimais = val(&PadObs) Endif
&PadObs = trim(Str(&TCon108_CasasDecimais)) + 'N' if &SdtColunasTabela2.TabRecCol = true &PadObs += 'S' Else &PadObs += 'N' Endif Endif &TCon108_CasasDecimais = Val(Substr(&PadObs,1,1)) do 'padraoColunas'
&TabCod = &DOISTabCod Do 'LoadPrecoTab2'
tbDadosAntecipacao2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabIsAntAcr &TabIsAntAcr2 = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabIsAntAcr
tbPercentuais1Tab2.Visible = 1 Tab111Tab2.Visible = 1
txtprc1Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom1 txtprc2Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom2 txtprc3Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom3 txtprc4Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom4 txtprc5Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom5 txtprc6Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom6 txtprc7Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom7 txtprc8Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom8 txtprc9Tab2.Caption = &SdtColunasTabela2.TabColNom9
prc1Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem1 prc2Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem2 prc3Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem3 prc4Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem4 prc5Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem5 prc6Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem6 prc7Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem7 prc8Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem8 prc9Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem9
Acr2Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem2 Acr3Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem3 Acr4Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem4 Acr5Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem5 Acr6Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem6 Acr7Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem7 Acr8Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem8 Acr9Tab2.Visible = &SdtColunasTabela2.Tem9

Sub 'GetFilial'
For Each order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod
&FilTabCod = FilTabCod &FilTabPrmCod = FilTabPrmCod
Exit EndFor
padraousuario.Call('L', '#TABELASSELECIONADAS#', 1, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &FilTabCod = trim(Substr(&PadObs, 1, 5)) &FilTabPrmCod = trim(Substr(&PadObs, 6, 5)) Endif
&UMTabCod = &FilTabCod
if not &FilTabPrmCod.IsEmpty() &DOISTabCod = &FilTabPrmCod Else tab2.Visible = 0 Endif
EndSub
